title: symplocos cochinchinensis var. philippinensis
intro: Symplocos cochinchinensis var. philippinensis, also known as the Philippine Symplocos or Molave, is a plant species of the Symplocaceae family, native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and aiding in wound healing. Symplocos cochinchinensis var. philippinensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine in various parts of the Philippines.
